options.a: the minimum speed at which the aeroplane can develop a lift force equal to its mass.
options.b: the maximum speed at which the aeroplane can develop a lift force (normal to the flight path) equal to its weight.
options.c: the minimum speed at which the aeroplane can develop a lift force (normal to the flight path) equal to its weight.
options.d: the maximum speed at which the aeroplane can develop a lift force equal to its mass.
